svg.title: RS232CableBoard — breadboard visualiser refused
svg.text: The breadboard visualiser refused this design with:

The breadboard visualiser renders single-circuit designs onto a standard solderless breadboard. The top-level design is a Board (RS232CableBoard) — a populated PCB. Render `board.circuit` directly, or use the `kicad_sch` exporter for the PCB schematic.
See the .kicad_sch (schematic) or .dot (graph) exports for this design.
